inline_comments:
HR (Thematic Break) Spacing Analysis ===================================== CommonMark Spec (0.31.2) Section 4.1 - Thematic Breaks: - Thematic breaks (---, ***, ___) produce
in HTML - "Thematic breaks do not need blank lines before or after" - A thematic break can interrupt a paragraph HTML Output per spec: Input: "Foo *** bar" HTML: "

Foo

bar

" PLAIN TEXT OUTPUT DECISION: The HR element is a block-level thematic separator. In plain text output, we render HRs as a visible separator "───" to maintain visual distinction.
Note: "Para\n---" is a setext heading in CommonMark!
Using *** to test actual HR behavior
Each HR renders as a separator
HR renders as separator, heading renders, para follows
Heading ends, HR renders, para follows
